name: Theming & Shared UI Components
description: Defines the app-wide dark theme through XAML resource dictionaries, semantic brush keys, and value converters. Provides shared dialog infrastructure (DarkDialog, DarkDialogWindow) and common UI helpers.

Dialogs/DarkDialog.cs.content:
class DarkDialog
  ShowConfirm(string message, string title) -> bool
  ShowAlert(string message, string title) -> void
  ShowTextInput(string title, string prompt, string defaultValue = "") -> string?

Helpers/BrushCache.cs.content:
class BrushCache
  Get(string hex) -> SolidColorBrush
  Theme(string key) -> SolidColorBrush

patterns: Semantic brush keys referenced by name throughout XAML
Static BrushCache for efficient brush reuse
